Disney Eats: Pineapple Upside Down Bundt Cake Recipe from Plaza Inn

“Celebrate Soulfully: Summer Vibes” begins on June 19 at the Disneyland Resort! This limited-time celebration showcases experiences that celebrate Black heritage and culture through music, food, and art through July 19. One of these food items, the Pineapple Upside Down Bundt Cake from Plaza Inn, is available early starting today, and we’re sharing the recipe
